title: Fractal Keep
public_claim: The Fractal Keep is a Murano-hosted (note: this is Exosite/ExoSense Murano IoT platform, not MuranoOS desktop) strategic command room that models the United States as a distributed, multi-domain fortress ecology rather than a flat list of systems.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
